## Goal

What outcome makes this issue done? One or two sentences a reader can verify.

## Proposed approach

How you plan to do it. Bullet points are fine. If you don't know yet, say so — that's a useful starting point for discussion.

## Acceptance checks

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...
- [ ] Restart-and-run-all succeeds on any affected notebook
- [ ] Tests pass

## Notes / open questions

Anything you're unsure about going in.
